candidates.reason: Credit stress should favour companies with strong balance sheets, high cash generation, resilient demand, and lower financing dependency. Quality compounders historically outperform during credit stress as investors reduce exposure to leveraged names.; Risk-off rotations should direct attention toward defensive, liquid, quality names rather than speculative attention names. Defensive quality includes consumer staples, healthcare, utilities, and low-volatility compounders.
